product.name: Tequila Shot Glasses Set of 6, 3 Oz Ceramic Mexican Shot Glasses with Hand Painted Pottery Design, Pink Decorative Drinking Cups for Tequila, Mezcal, Mojitos, Whiskey
features: Decorative Shot Glasses Set: Including 6 pink Mexican shot glasses, each measures 1.7''D x 3.4''H. Suitable for both daily use and frequent gatherings. Also great as decorative art pieces that can elevate your home bar, kitchen shelf, or party table with a vibrant Mexican aesthetic.

Premium Ceramic Easy to Clean: Made from high-quality, lead-free ceramic, ZAVOOS tequila shot glasses are sturdy, heat-resistant, and built to last. Designed for convenience, these ceramic shot glasses are dishwasher-safe and easy to hand wash without fading their vibrant patterns.

Ideal Capacity for Versatile Drinks: Featuring the perfect 3 oz capacity, these glasses are expertly designed for sipping spirits. They ideally present tequila, mezcal, vodka, or whiskey, enhancing the full flavor profile and delivering an authentic tasting experience with every pour.

Exquisite Handcrafted Craftsmanship: Meticulously hand-painted with floral patterns, blending traditional Mexican charm, making every piece a unique work of art that brings authentic festival flair to your table, adding a touch of aesthetic elegance and ceremony to every toast.

Vibrant Addition to Any Celebration: Adding Mexican charm into weddings, fiestas, Cinco de Mayo, bachelorette parties, or holiday gatherings. The eye-catching design adds a festive touch, making these glasses a memorable gift for friends, family, or tequila enthusiasts.
